title: Food Culture & Cooking
topics: cooking verbs · recipes · dietary requirements · food adjectives
description: Vaření, recepty, dieta a jak mluvit o jídle v angličtině.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.text: This sauce is amazing. How did you make it?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.text: I fried the onions first, then added garlic and tomatoes.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.text: How long do you simmer it?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.text: About 20 minutes. Then season with salt, pepper, and fresh basil.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.text: Do you have the full recipe? I'd love to try it at home.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.text: Of course! I'll send it to you.

examples.en: Peel and chop the onions, then fry them in olive oil.
examples.cz: Oloupejte a nakrájejte cibuli, pak ji orestujte na olivovém oleji.

examples.en: Bake at 180°C for 25 minutes until golden brown.
examples.cz: Pečte při 180 °C po dobu 25 minut do zlatohnědé barvy.

examples.en: Do you have anything gluten-free on the menu?
examples.cz: Máte na jídelním lístku něco bezlepkového?

examples.en: The steak was perfectly cooked — tender and juicy.
examples.cz: Steak byl dokonale připraven — jemný a šťavnatý.

quiz.sentence: She ___ the vegetables in olive oil for 5 minutes. (fried)
I'm ___ — I don't eat meat or dairy. (vegan)
The chicken was ___ in the oven for 45 minutes. (baked)
Add salt and pepper to ___ the dish.

tasks: 1. Write a recipe for your favourite Czech dish in English (8–10 steps)
2. Describe a restaurant experience using food adjectives
3. Write a dialogue: customer with a food allergy ordering at a restaurant
